issues: Key library not imported (AttributeError will occur). Import pynput.keyboard is missing.
Incorrect attribute usage for capturing keys. Use key.char instead of str(key.char) for regular characters.
Special key check should use key == keyboard.Key.enter, key == keyboard.Key.space, and key == keyboard.Key.esc after importing Key from pynput.keyboard.
No debug prints are allowed as per the additional constraints unless specified.
Inefficient file handling: opening and closing the file repeatedly in each function call is not optimal.
summary: Several issues with correctness and alignment to the goal, reasonable readibility
